title: Biome Compatibility Patch
description: Renames content to preserve compatibility between the 4 major biome mods as well as Terralith, Environmental, Atmospheric, Autumnity, Upgrade Aquatic, Wetland Whimsy, and Jaden's Nether Expansion.
body: **Renames content to preserve compatibility between the 4 major biome mods as well as Terralith, Environmental, Atmospheric, Autumnity, Upgrade Aquatic, Wetland Whimsy, and Jaden's Nether Expansion.**
